overall_saga_goals: Complete Silver Armor set and upgrades
Craft Wolf Armor Cape for frost immunity
Locate 3 Dragon Eggs for Moder altar
Establish a 'Wolf-Industrial Complex' for pelt/meat automation
Maintain Golem spawn-cap through pit trapping

segment_definitions.title: The Bog Witch & Preparation
segment_definitions.activity: Procure beast taming potions and stockpile meat
segment_definitions.teaching_moment: Latest Bog Witch update features and potion mechanics

segment_definitions.title: The Harpoon Escort
segment_definitions.activity: Ascend Mountain to locate 1-star or 2-star Wolf; Harpoon and drag to the Black Forest pit
segment_definitions.teaching_moment: Using the Abyssal Harpoon for predator management and gravity-assisted transport

segment_definitions.title: The Taming Wait: Grandpa's Dev Log
segment_definitions.activity: 30-minute idle period within render distance of the pit
segment_definitions.secondary_activity: Golem pit maintenance check and tower base review

segment_definitions.title: The Wolf-Clad Transformation
segment_definitions.activity: Confirm taming, harvest initial pelts, and craft the Wolf Cape
segment_definitions.teaching_moment: Why the Cape is superior to the Silver Chest for gear flexibility (Root Harnesk swap)

technical_constraints.combat_restrictions: Avoid spear usage; utilize Frostner/Silver Sword/Draugr Fang
technical_constraints.base_strategy: Maintain Black Forest forge for Greydwarf-vs-Wolf entertainment ROI
technical_constraints.logistics: Use Portals for pelt transport; manual haul for future Dragon Eggs
